title: BBAN-288 Candidates and teachers. Forbidden Lesbian After School I love the appearance of a female student who works hard to study at the school of her choice ... Hinata Koizumi Kanako Iioka - Kana Morisawa (Kanako Iioka)
description: A cute student who stays and studies after school to attend the school of his choice. Eventually, the female teacher in charge wanted to hug the student and love each other. I want to make this student mine ... While caring for a student who collapsed due to overwork, his hand reached out to the student's body. Hinata Koizumi x Kanako Iioka Full-scale lesbian work!
